title: Drawing a 3D Box ROI — first corner placed, dragging to second corner
capture_instructions: 3D Box drawing mode is active (selected from shape picker). The user has placed the first corner (visible as a point or corner indicator) and is currently dragging to the second corner. A rectangular preview outline stretches between the first corner and the cursor position. The cursor is approximately over the opposite corner of a building footprint. Camera is at a slight top-down perspective.
ui_state: 3D Box draw mode active, first corner placed, dragging to second corner, preview rectangle visible

annotations.label: First corner — click to start box
Second corner — click here to complete box footprint
Box footprint preview (stretches as cursor moves)
Drag direction from first to second corner
